entries.title: GRAPH_EDGES tick writes: use write_pool_server() directly; insert between orphaned-edge compaction and TypedGraphState rebuild
UDS Observation Log: operator-togglable debug visibility via unimatrix_server::obs target
Lazy-loading ONNX service handle: generalized state machine for any optional inference provider
